prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约1703→4261→2523，2024年大幅后移约2558名后2025年明显回弹至2523名，近3年波动剧烈，2025年基准约2523名；本省理科计划2023年28人、2024年26人、2025年22人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年计划23人，较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩幅约4.5%，对竞争略有缓解但影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第42名，近年排名稳中有升（2021年第44→2026年第42），属全国顶尖财经类院校；2023年声誉偏 负面（新闻传播学类专业投档位次下滑）；2026年抖音热度排名第97/106，综合热度一般，短视频曝光量偏低；未见明显投档断档记录；应用经济学A、理论经 济学A-，为财经类院校顶尖水平；与金融学类、财政学类、经济学类等招生专业直接对应，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业热度2024年评估 为分化观望，整体平稳；会计/财务/审计评估为推荐，热度偏热；计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业持续高热推荐。本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人（较2025年文理合计约7.6 5万人大幅增长约211%），按历史比例估算理科约16.3万人，竞争环境显著加剧；中央财经大学位于北京，属跨省报考， 对新疆考生而言地域偏好一般；该校在新疆招生规模较小（理科20余人），本地招生占比极低。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2523名、2026年理科计划小幅扩招至23人（ 扩幅约4.5%）、本省考生规模大幅增长（理科从约5.3万增至约16.3万）及学校声誉平稳等因素，竞争加剧是主导方向；预测2026年理科最低位次约2612名，区间2220–3004名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融科技（北航计算机联培项目）
- 大数据管理与应用（许国志大数据英才班）
- 金融学类（金融工程、金融科技）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 财政学类（财政学、税收学等）
- 统计学类（经济统计学、统计学等）
- 经济学类（经济学、国民经济管理）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（会计学、财务管理等）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 工商管理类（商学院）（工商管理、市场营销等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2220–3004名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业作为冲刺（需位次明显优于区间下限），三档专业作为保底。金融科技、大数据管理与应用等交叉学 科热度持续走高，竞争可能加剧；财政学类、会计学院等传统优势专业学科评估高，适合位次中上的考生稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2023–2025 minimum science rankings approximately 1703→4261→2523, with a significant backward shift of about 2558 places in 2024 followed by a clear rebound to 2523 in 2025, showing drastic fluctuations over the past 3 years, with a 2025 baseline of about 2523; provincial science enrollment plans were 28 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 22 in 2025, showing a year-on-year reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 23, a slight increase of 1 student from 2025, an expansion of about 4.5%, which slightly eases competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable upward trend in recent years (44th in 2021→42nd in 2026), belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions; reputation was somewhat negative in 2023 (declining application rankings for journalism and communication majors); 2026 Douyin popularity ranked 97/106, with average overall popularity and low short video exposure; no obvious application gaps recorded; Applied Economics rated A, Theoretical Economics rated A-, at the top level among finance and economics institutions; directly corresponds to enrollment majors such as Finance, Public Finance, and Economics, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of finance/economics majors assessed as divergent and wait-and-see in 2024, overall stable; accounting/finance/auditing assessed as recommended, with a hot trend; computer science, electronic information/communication and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended. The province's 2026 total number of examinees is about 238,000 (a significant increase of about 211% from the 2025 total of about 76,500 for arts and science combined), with an estimated science count of about 163,000 based on historical proportions, significantly intensifying the competitive environment; Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, a cross-province application, with average regional preference for Xinjiang examinees; the university's enrollment scale in Xinjiang is small (over 20 science students), with an extremely low local enrollment proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2523, the slight expansion of the 2026 science plan to 23 students (expansion of about 4.5%), the significant increase in the province's examinee count (science from about 53,000 to about 163,000), and stable school reputation, intensified competition is the dominant direction; predicting the 2026 minimum science ranking to be about 2612, with a range of 2220–3004.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Financial Technology (Beihang University Computer Joint Training Program)
- Big Data Management and Application (Xu Guozhi Big Data Talent Class)
- Finance (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Public Finance (Public Finance, Taxation, etc.)
- Statistics (Economic Statistics, Statistics, etc.)
- Economics (Economics, National Economic Management)
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (Accounting, Financial Management, etc.)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Business Administration (Business School) (Business Administration, Marketing, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2220–3004, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Cross-disciplinary majors such as Financial Technology and Big Data Management and Application continue to see rising popularity, potentially intensifying competition; traditional advantageous majors like Public Finance and Accounting School have high discipline evaluations, suitable for mid-to-upper ranking examinees to choose steadily.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 376 → 583 → 448. In 2024, it dropped significantly by about 207 places, then rebounded to 448 in 2025, showing clear fluctuations over the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is around 448. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 11 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 17 in 2025, showing a year-on-year expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 17, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable or rising trend in recent years, making it a top national finance and economics institution. In 2023, its reputation was somewhat negative (the journalism and communication major saw a decline in application rankings). In 2026, its Douyin popularity ranked 97th/106, with average overall popularity. No obvious application gaps were recorded. Applied Economics is rated A, and Theoretical Economics is rated A-, representing the top level among finance and economics universities. This directly corresponds to liberal arts majors such as finance and public finance.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of finance/economics/economy majors was assessed as divergent and wait-and-see; law was assessed as divergent and wait-and-see; journalism and communication was assessed as clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 238,000 (a significant increase of about 211% from the combined arts and sciences total of about 76,500 in 2025). By historical proportion, liberal arts examinees are estimated at about 75,000, significantly intensifying the competitive environment. Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, making it a cross-province application. Its liberal arts enrollment in Xinjiang is relatively small (about 17 people), with a very low local enrollment proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 448, the 2026 liberal arts plan unchanged at 17, a substantial increase in the number of provincial examinees (liberal arts from about 24,000 to about 75,000), and stable university reputation, intensified competition is the dominant trend. The predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is about 463, with a range of 393–533.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 393–533, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch (requiring rankings significantly better than the lower end of the range), and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Majors like Public Finance and Finance are top-tier with A-level discipline evaluations and are highly competitive. Majors like Law and Business Administration (Business School) have divergent popularity, so personal interest should be considered when choosing.
